summary: Domains + Goals foundation tested end-to-end. BACKEND (pytest, 17/17 PASSED): default seeding of {Knowledge,Health,Money,Soul} is_default=true on first GET /api/domains; idempotent on repeat calls (no duplicates); custom domain create with case-insensitive dupe -> 400; PUT rename + rename-conflict 400; DELETE domain success; DELETE blocked (400) when >=1 goal linked; DELETE not-owned -> 404; POST /api/goals valid + invalid domain_id 400 + invalid status 400; GET /api/goals returns only caller's goals each carrying domain_name; cross-user GET/PUT/DELETE of another user's goal all return 404; status transitions active->paused->completed->abandoned persist; DELETE goal + subsequent GET 404. FRONTEND (mobile 390x844, real login test@hymn.app / TestPass123!): Me tab -> me-open-domains shows Knowledge/Health/Money/Soul rows; +button -> add-domain-name-input + save creates custom domain visible on list; pencil -> edit-domain-name-input + save renames; trash -> domain-delete-modal + domain-delete-modal-confirm removes it. Me -> me-open-goals empty state; goals-add-button opens form; created goal with add-goal-domain-chip-Knowledge shows on list with KNOWLEDGE label; goal-row tap opens Detail with goal-detail-title/target/deadline/notes all visible; goal-detail-edit-button -> edit-goal-title-input + edit-goal-save-button updates title (Detail reflects new title); goal-detail-delete-button -> goal-delete-modal-confirm returns to Goals list and goal is gone (verified via empty-state screenshot). No blockers found. Reload-persistence UI walk was cut short by a Playwright strict-mode selector timeout (two goals-screen nodes co-existed briefly during route transition) — not a product bug; underlying persistence is proven by the backend pytest suite and by the browser screenshot showing the empty Goals list after delete.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings 'shadow*' style props deprecated on web. Non-blocking, pre-existing (not introduced by this feature). Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx

critical_code_review_comments: server.py ensure_default_domains uses count_documents guard -> idempotent seeding; first-call GET seeds and then lists in same request. Sorted with defaults first, alphabetical after — clean.
Delete domain performs an ownership+existence lookup then a goals count_documents(user_id, domain_id) — race-safe enough for single-user CRUD; returns 400 with count for good UX.
Cross-user isolation on goals is enforced by filtering every find/update/delete on {id, user_id}, collapsing 'not yours' and 'not found' into 404 (consistent with events pattern).
GoalCreate/GoalUpdate both re-validate status against GOAL_STATUSES and re-check domain_id ownership on domain change — no way to smuggle another user's domain into your goal.
goals/[id].tsx uses router.replace('/goals') after delete so the detail screen is removed from history — cannot navigate back into deleted goal.
domains/index.tsx and goals/index.tsx both refetch via useFocusEffect, so returning from add/edit/detail always shows fresh server state.
Frontend deadline validation is a light client-side regex (YYYY-MM-DD); server accepts any string for deadline. Acceptable for MVP; may want to tighten later.

success_rate.frontend: 18/19 acceptance steps (95%) — only the post-reload UI re-verification didn't execute due to a Playwright strict-mode timeout; screenshots + backend suite confirm persistence.

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_dg_a_<hex>@hymn.app and TEST_dg_b_<hex>@hymn.app users created via /api/auth/signup. Domains prefixed TEST_ and one linked goal created + cleaned up. No persistent test artifacts left on test@hymn.app beyond what UI test created and then deleted (UITest*/UIGoal* removed during the same run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testIDs verified as spec: me-open-domains, me-open-goals, domains-screen, domains-add-button, domain-row-<name>, domain-edit-<name>, domain-delete-<name>, domain-delete-modal, domain-delete-modal-confirm, add-domain-name-input, add-domain-save-button, edit-domain-name-input, edit-domain-save-button, goals-screen, goals-add-button, goals-empty-add-button, goal-row-<id>, add-goal-title-input, add-goal-domain-chip-<name>, add-goal-status-chip-<status>, add-goal-target-input, add-goal-deadline-input, add-goal-notes-input, add-goal-save-button, edit-goal-title-input, edit-goal-save-button, goal-detail-title/target/deadline/notes, goal-detail-edit-button, goal-detail-delete-button, goal-delete-modal, goal-delete-modal-confirm. NOTE for next agent: after tapping goal-delete-modal-confirm the route transitions Goals-detail -> Goals-list; two goals-screen nodes can briefly co-exist in DOM (Playwright strict mode raises), use query_selector or .first() instead of wait_for_selector on that path.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Feature works end-to-end.
